decisions.text: Use CASTEP with GGA-PBE as the main DFT code going forward
decisions.rationale: Selected for geometry optimisations; established as main computational setup for this project.

methods_updates.parameters: GGA-PBE functional, 830 eV plane-wave cutoff, 1×1×1 k-grid, norm-conserving pseudopotentials, no dispersion correction

dashboard_status_line: Active — CASTEP DFT setup established; geometry optimisations underway.
